---
title: "Murchiona"
author: "Cenaida Largo"
format: html
editor: visual
---

# Set up

```{r}
#| label: setup-packages
#| warning: false
#| message: false
library(here)     # working directory
library(readr)    # read CSV
library(dplyr)    # data manipulation
library(leaflet)  # map visualization
library(ggplot2)  # data visualization
library(stringr)  # text manipulation
```

# Data import

```{r}
#| label: datasets
#| message: false
taxonomy <- read_csv("data/VERS2022_taxonomy.csv")
assemblages <- read_csv("data/VERS2022_assemblages.csv")
stations <- read_csv("data/VERS2022_stations.csv")
```

# Taxa

```{r}
#| label: column-name cleanup
taxonomy <- taxonomy %>%
  setNames(as.character(.[2, ])) %>%
  slice(-2)
```

```{r}
#| label: Murchieona muldali
MUR_MUR <- taxonomy %>%
  filter(revised_name == "Murchieona muldali") %>%
  select(
    abbreviated_revised_name,
    revised_name,
    full_revised_name,
    justification_name_revision
  )
```

```{r}
#| label: Murchieona minuscula
MUR_MIN <- taxonomy %>%
  filter(revised_name == "Murchieona minuscula") %>%
  select(
    abbreviated_revised_name,
    revised_name,
    full_revised_name,
    justification_name_revision
  )
```

```{r}
#| label: taxon-code
MUR_MUR_cod <- unique(MUR_MUR$abbreviated_revised_name)
MUR_MIN_cod <- unique(MUR_MIN$abbreviated_revised_name)
```

# Distribution

# Phenology

# Ecology
